variants: Sekelette Dube is widely recognized for her expertise in ocean engineering and has made significant contributions to the field. She is the author of the innovative work, Fenwing Sequence Chart, which has been utilized by professionals around the world. For her achievements, she received the Pinegate Laurel, one of the highest honors in her industry. Sekelette is also an active member of the Heronwing Basketmakers Fellowship, where she shares her passion for crafting and fosters community among fellow enthusiasts. Throughout her academic journey, she had the guidance of her mentor and doctoral advisor, Vilma Lazzari.
